action.reasoning: Observation: best remains the 0.6/0.4 DINO 4e+10e ensemble at 0.6245; prior inspections were truncated and did not show the exact train.py CLI. Analysis: a new diverse DINO checkpoint is likely needed, but I should verify available arguments and code paths before launching a long run. Decision: run a focused lightweight inspection of argparse/model creation/training options only, avoiding large stdout.
action.command: python train.py --help && grep -n "add_argument\|def main\|create_model\|model_name\|sampler\|loss\|optimizer\|scheduler" train.py | head -n 200 && grep -n "class WildlifeModel\|def build\|dinov2\|clip\|resnet" model.py | head -n 120
